de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class FunctionalLoopContract

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<LoopContract>
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.FunctionalLoopContract
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Contract, SpecificationElement

    public class FunctionalLoopContract
extends FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<LoopContract>
    This class is only used to generate a proof obligation for a block that starts with a loop (see FunctionalLoopContractPO. If a block is encountered during a proof, LoopContract is used instead.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.Contract

        Contract.OriginalVariables

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.Contract

        INVALID_ID

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ContractPO createProofObl(InitConfig initConfig)
      Returns a proof obligation to the passed initConfig.
      ProofOblInput createProofObl(InitConfig initConfig, Contract contract)
      Returns a proof obligation to the passed contract and initConfig.
      ProofOblInput createProofObl(InitConfig initConfig, Contract contract, boolean supportSymbolicExecutionAPI)
      Returns a proof obligation to the passed contract and initConfig.
      FunctionalLoopContract map(java.util.function.UnaryOperator<Term> op, Services services)
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
      void replaceEnhancedForVariables(Services services)
      Replaces \index and \values with the proper variables in all terms of this contract.
      Contract setID(int newId)
      Returns a contract which is identical this contract except that the id is set to the new id.
      Contract setTarget(KeYJavaType newKJT, IObserverFunction newPM)
      Returns a contract which is identical to this contract except that the KeYJavaType and IObserverFunction are set to the new values.

      • map

        public FunctionalLoopContract map(java.util.function.UnaryOperator<Term> op,
                                  Services services)
        Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
        Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.

        op - the operator to apply.
        services - services.
        Returns:
        this specification element with the operator applied.

        public Contract setID(int newId)

      • setTarget

        public Contract setTarget(KeYJavaType newKJT,
                          IObserverFunction newPM)
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Returns a contract which is identical to this contract except that the KeYJavaType and IObserverFunction are set to the new values.
        Parameters:
        newKJT - the new KeYJavaType
        newPM - the new observer function
        Returns:
        an identical contract with the new KJT and PM (see above)
